def negative_fastapi_background_task_exception_silent():
    rule_id = "fastapi_background_task_exception_silent"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "FastAPI background task dispatches appear to rely on default exception behavior without visible error handling."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
